codeReview.summary: BlokFormPage.tsx implementation is complete and correct. All 4 new fields (pokok, sph, bulan_tanam, status_tanaman) are present in the form with appropriate input types. The Blok interface has been updated in both BlokFormPage.tsx and electron.d.ts. Both createBlok and updateBlok operations correctly send the new fields to the API. The Blok database layer (blokDatabase.ts) has also been updated to accept the new parameters.

issues.description: status_tanaman uses radio buttons instead of a select dropdown. This is a UI design choice that still fulfills the functional requirement (user can select TM/TBM/TTM/TLS options). The feature description says 'select' but radio buttons provide equivalent functionality.

sharedStateObservations.observation: No convention violations found. The worker followed AGENTS.md conventions: updated Blok interface, added form fields, used appropriate input types (number for pokok, text for sph and bulan_tanam, radio group for status_tanaman).

Skill procedure was followed. The worker updated BlokFormPage.tsx with 4 new form fields, updated Blok interface, and verified via typecheck and lint. No interactive browser verification was performed due to environment constraints, which is documented in the handoff.
No new services or commands were used beyond the documented npm run typecheck and npm run lint.

No new knowledge gaps discovered. The sph field uses type='text' input (allowing decimal entry) rather than type='number', which is consistent with how the luas field is handled in the same form. This is a reasonable design choice.

summary: Feature blok-ui-form-update implementation passes review. BlokFormPage.tsx has all required new form fields (pokok as integer input, sph as decimal input, bulan_tanam as text input, status_tanaman as radio select with TM/TBM/TTM/TLS options). The Blok interface is properly updated in both BlokFormPage.tsx and electron.d.ts. Both createBlok and updateBlok API calls correctly pass the new fields. The blokDatabase.ts layer has been updated to accept new parameters. Typecheck and lint pass. VAL-BLOK-005 (Blok form accepts new fields) is fulfilled.
